member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for that wrap Cosmos DB operations in and for Railway-Oriented Programming.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.FindAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,System.String,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.PartitionKey,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads an item by id. Returns Option.None when not found (404), or Result.Failure on any other error.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.ReadAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,System.String,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.PartitionKey,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads an item by id. Returns Result.Failure(NotFound) when not found. Use if you prefer the path.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.CreateAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,``0,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.PartitionKey},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new item. Returns Result.Failure(Conflict) if the item already exists.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.UpsertAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,``0,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.PartitionKey},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates or replaces an item (upsert semantics).

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.ReplaceAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,``0,System.String,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.PartitionKey},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Replaces an existing item by id. Returns Result.Failure(NotFound) if missing.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.DeleteAsync(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,System.String,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.PartitionKey,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an item by id. Returns Result.Failure(NotFound) if missing.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.QueryAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.QueryDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a and collects all pages into a list.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.QueryAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query string and collects all pages into a list.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.ContainerExtensions.QueryFirstOrNoneAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.QueryDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a and returns the first result as an Option. Returns Option.None when the query returns no results.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.CosmosExceptionMapping
member.summary: Maps to MonadicSharp values, preserving semantic meaning (404 → NotFound, 409 → Conflict, etc.).

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.CosmosDb.CosmosExceptionMapping.ToMonadicError(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosException)
member.summary: Converts a to a structured . Status codes are mapped to the most semantically appropriate .
